mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RECALL_IMG_QUIZ (member_no, img_url, question) VALUES (#{memberNo}, #{imgUrl}, #{request.question})

INSERT INTO RECALL_IMG_DISTRACT (img_quiz_no, validation, text) VALUES
( #{imgQuizNo}, #{imgQuiz.validation.code}, #{imgQuiz.text} )
mapper.select:
SELECT REIQ.img_quiz_no AS imgQuizNo , REIQ.member_no AS memberNo , REIQ.question AS question , REIQ.img_url AS imgUrl , REID.img_distract_no AS imgDistractNo , REID.validation AS validation , REID.text AS text FROM RECALL_IMG_QUIZ REIQ
LEFT JOIN RECALL_IMG_DISTRACT REID ON REID.img_quiz_no = REIQ.img_quiz_no
WHERE REIQ.member_no = #{memberNo} AND REIQ.deleted_dt IS NULL AND REID.deleted_dt IS NULL

SELECT REIQ.img_quiz_no AS imgQuizNo , REIQ.member_no AS memberNo , REIQ.img_url AS imgUrl , REIQ.question AS question , REID.img_distract_no AS imgDistractNo , REID.validation AS validation , REID.text AS text
FROM RECALL_IMG_QUIZ REIQ
LEFT JOIN RECALL_IMG_DISTRACT REID ON REID.img_quiz_no = REIQ.img_quiz_no
WHERE REIQ.img_quiz_no = #{imgQuizNo} AND REIQ.deleted_dt IS NULL AND REID.deleted_dt IS NULL
